name: io.github.speakai/mcp-server
title: Speak AI
description: Search recordings, summarize meetings, create clips, and automate workflows from your AI assistant.

environmentVariables.name: SPEAK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Speak AI API key. Generate one at https://app.speakai.co/developers/apikeys.

environmentVariables.name: SPEAK_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Speak AI API base URL. Defaults to https://api.speakai.co.
